jsonld.name: Prosthetic Futurity
jsonld.description: Temporarily providing future-orientation and forward-momentum for someone whose hope-system has failed, substituting your architectural capacity to generate optimistic future-directed language for their absent ability to experience temporal possibility, serving as borrowed hope until their own future-orientation restores.
